hero.badge: Sami kuɗi daga filin ajiye motarka
hero.title: Mayar da Filinka zuwa Kuɗi na Gaske
hero.sub: Lissafta filin ajiye motarka akan Space Park kuma sami kuɗi duk lokacin da wani yayi parking. Nazarin lokaci na gaske, biyan kuɗi ta atomatik, da cikakken iko — duka a cikin dashboard ɗinka.

process.title: Farawa a Matakai 3
process.sub: Sanya filin ajiye motarka a lissafi kuma fara samun kuɗi — ba a buƙatar ƙwarewar fasaha

step1.label: Mataki na 1
step1.title: Sanya Buƙatarka
step1.desc: Cika bayanan filinka, nuna wurinka akan taswira, kuma loda shaidar mallaka — yana ɗaukar ƙasa da mintuna 5.

step2.label: Mataki na 2
step2.title: Samun Amincewa cikin Kwanaki
step2.desc: Ƙungiyarmu tana dubawa cikin kwanakin aiki 2-5. Duba matsayinka tare da ID ɗin Buƙatarka. Za ka sami bayanan shiga ta imel.

step3.label: Mataki na 3
step3.title: Sami Kuɗi ta Atomatik
step3.desc: Yankinka zai fara aiki nan take. Kula da kuɗaɗen shiga, zama, da aiki kutoka dashboard ɗinka na abokan tarayya.

benefits.title: Duk Abin da Kake Buƙata don Nasara

card1.title: Riƙe 90% na Kuɗaɗen Shiga
card1.desc: Muna ɗaukar kwamishina na 10% — babu kuɗaɗen ɓoye, babu kuɗin sanyawa, babu kuɗin kowane wata. Abin da ka samu naka ne.

card2.title: Nazarin Lokaci na Gaske
card2.desc: Kula da yawan mutane, tarihin zama, da kuɗaɗen shiga na yau da kullun tare da dashboard mai kyau.

card3.title: Biyan Kuɗi ta Banki ta Atomatik
card3.desc: Haɗa asusun bankinka sau ɗaya kuma sami biyan kuɗi ta atomatik — ba a buƙatar tsarin fitar da kuɗi da kanka.

card4.title: Gani a Kan App Nan Take
card4.desc: Yankinka zai bayyana akan app ɗin Space Park da zarar an amince dashi, wanda dubban direbobi ke gani yau da kullun.

card5.title: Tabbatacce kuma Mai Aminci
card5.desc: Ƙungiyarmu tana tabbatar da kowane fili, yana ba direbobi kwarin gwiwa da ƙara yawan masu parking a yankinka.

card6.title: Gudanarwa da Kanka
card6.desc: Sabunta farashinka na sa'a, lokutan aiki, da bayanan yankinka daga dashboard ɗinka a kowane lokaci.

mobile.title: Direbobi Suna Samun Ka akan Space Park
mobile.sub: Yankinka da aka lissafa yana bayyana nan take ga direbobi da ke amfani da app ɗin Space Park — nema, parking, da biya duka a wuri ɗaya.

card1.title: Nemo Parking
card1.desc: Direbobi suna neman wuraren da ake dasu kusa da inda zasu je a lokaci na gaske.

card2.title: Biyan Kuɗi ta Dijital
card2.desc: Ana biyan kowane zama ta dandalin dijital — babu buƙatar karɓar kuɗi a hannu.

card3.title: Bin Autun Zama
card3.desc: Fara, tsawaita, kuma ƙare zaman parking kutoka app tare da cikakken bayani.

card4.title: Sanarwa Nan Take
card4.desc: Direbobi suna samun tunatarwa kuma kai kana samun sanarwar zama — komai ta atomatik.

cta.title: Shirye don Fara Samun Kuɗi?
cta.sub: Kasance tare da ɗaruruwan masu filin ajiye motoci da ke samun kuɗi akan Space Park. Babu kuɗin nema.

contact.title: Kuna da Tambayoyi?
contact.sub: Sanya duk tambayoyin da kuke dasu kuma ƙungiyarmu zata ba ku amsa.

footer.desc: Hanya mafi kyau don samun kuɗi daga filin ajiye motarka. Haɗu da dubban direbobi kuma sami kuɗi ta atomatik.

apply.title: Nemi don Lissafta Filinka
apply.subtitle: Cika fom ɗin da ke ƙasa don sanya yankin parking ɗinka akan Jambo Parking

zone.title: Bayanan Yanki
zone.name: Sunan Yanki da aka Ba da Shawara
zone.instructionsPlaceholder: Yaya ya kamata direbobi su sami ko su shiga wurin?

map.title: Nuna Wurinka
map.sub: Danna akan taswira don sanya nuni daidai inda filin parking ɗinka yake.

review.title: Dubawa & Turawa
review.sub: Loda shaidar mallaka (DOLE), sannan ka tura buƙatarka.
review.agree: Na karanta kuma na yarda da Shaɗoɗi da Halaye

error.personal: Da fatan za ka cika dukkan bayanan kai.
error.zone: Da fatan za a cika dukkan bayanan yankin.
error.pin: Da fatan za a danna kan taswirar don sanya wurin yankin ku.
error.upload: Da fatan za a loda shaidar mallaka (PNG, JPG ko PDF).
error.generic: Mika ya gaza. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.

locate.title: Nemo Ni
locate.error: An hana shiga wurin ko ba a samun sa.

addZone.title: Ƙara Sabon Yanki
addZone.sub: Aika buƙatar ƙara wani wurin ajiye motoci a ƙarƙashin asusun ku.
addZone.subtitle: Aika buƙatar ƙara wani wurin ajiye motoci a ƙarƙashin asusun ku.
addZone.successMsg: Nasarar! An tura buƙatarka ({{id}}) kuma ana duba ta.

form.name: Sunan Yanki da aka Ba da Shawara
form.hoursPlaceholder: misali. 24/7 ko 8 na safe - 6 na yamma
form.mapSub: Danna ko'ina akan taswira don sanya yankin parking ɗinka daidai.

mapLocation.label: Nuna Wuri akan Taswira
mapLocation.instruction: Danna ko'ina akan taswira don sanya yankin parking ɗinka daidai.

addZone.errorMsg: Mika ya gaza. Da fatan za a duba abubuwan da kuka shigar.

login.title: Dandalin Abokan Tarayya
login.subtitle: Shiga don sarrafa yankin parking ɗinka
login.error: Shiga bai yi nasara ba. Da fatan za ka duba bayanan ka.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcome: Barka da dawowa! Ga yadda wurinka yake aiki.
dashboard.error: Loda dashboard ya gaza. Da fatan za ka sake gwadawa.

charts.noData: Babu bayanan kuɗi tukunna. Za su bayyana nan da zama ya ƙare.

table.noSessions: Babu zama tukunna. Za su bayyana nan da direbobi suka fara parking.

success.title: An Tura Buƙata!
success.subtitle: An karɓi buƙatarka. Ƙungiyarmu zata duba ta cikin kwanakin aiki 2-5 kuma zamu sanar dakai ta imel.
success.saveIdTip: Ajiye wannan ID — zaka buƙace shi don duba matsayin buƙatarka

status.title: Duba Matsayin Buƙata
status.subtitle: Sanya ID ɗin buƙatarka don ganin matsayin turawarka
status.label: ID ɗin Buƙata

error.empty: Da fatan za ka sanya ID ɗin buƙata.
error.notFound: Ba'a sami buƙata da wannan ID ɗin ba. Da fatan za ka duba.
error.generic: Wani abu ya faru. Da fatan za ka sake gwadawa.

pending.label: Ana Dubawa
pending.msg: Ƙungiyarmu tana duba buƙatarka. Yawanci yana ɗaukar kwanakin aiki 2-5.

approved.label: An Amince
approved.msg: Taya murna! An amince da yankinka kuma yanzu yana aiki. Duba imel ɗinka don bayanan shiga.

rejected.label: Ba'a Amince ba
rejected.msg: Abin tausayi ba'a amince da buƙatarka ba a wannan lokacin. Da fatan za ka duba bayanan ko tuntuɓi taimako.

bank.title: Bayanan Banki
bank.subtitle: Sarrafa asusunka don karɓar biyan kuɗi
bank.info: Ana kiyaye wannan bayanin kuma ana amfani dashi ne kawai don tura kuɗin da ka samu.
bank.accountHolderPlaceholder: Suna kamar yadda yake a asusun

error.required: Dole ne a cika dukkan wuraren.

bank.success: An ajiye bayanan banki cikin nasara.

password.title: Canza Kalmar Sirri
password.subtitle: Sabunta kalmar sirrinka don kiyaye asusunka
password.tip: Bayan canza kalmar sirri, zaka buƙaci sake shiga akan dukkan na'urorinka.

error.mismatch: Sabbin kalmomin sirri basu zo ɗaya ba.
error.length: Dole kalmar sirri ta kai haruffa 8.

howItWorks.title: Yadda Space Park Yake Aiki
howItWorks.subtitle: Space Park yana haɗa masu filayen parking masu zaman kansu da direbobi. Ga yadda tsarin yake aiki tun daga nema har zuwa biyan kuɗi na farko.

1.title: Sanya Buƙatarka
1.desc: Cika wani gajeren fom tare da bayananka da na yankinka — suna, adireshi, adadin wurare da farashin sa'a. Nuna wurin akan taswira. Yana ɗaukar ƙasa da mintuna 5.

2.title: Duba Buƙata
2.desc: Ƙungiyarmu tana duba buƙatarka cikin kwanakin aiki 2-5. Zamu iya kiran ka don tabbatar da mallaka. Duba matsayinka da ID ɗinka.

3.title: Amincewa & Farawa
3.desc: Da zarar an amince, ana samar da yankinka akan Space Park kuma direbobi zasu ganshi. Zaka sami imel na shiga.

4.title: Sanya Bayanan Biyan Kuɗi
4.desc: Lokacin shigarka na farko, sanya bayanan bankinka. Nan ne zamu tura maka kuɗinka tsafe — babu buƙatar cirewa da kanka.

5.title: Kula da Kuɗinka
5.desc: Yi amfani da Dashboard don ganin masu amfani, tarihin zama, kuɗin yau da na wata, da fasalin aiki tare da hotuna.

6.title: Karɓi Biyan Kuɗinka
6.desc: Ana lissafa kuɗin kowane zama ta atomatik, a rage kwamishinarmu, a tura maka ragowar zuwa asusun bankinka tsafe.

faq.title: Tambayoyin da Ake Yawan Yi
faq.q1: Nawa ne Space Park yake ɗauka?
faq.a1: Space Park yana ɗaukar kwamishina na 10% akan kowane zama. Kana riƙe da 90%. Ana ganin ragin a dashboard ɗinka.
faq.a2: Ana tura kuɗi zuwa asusunka tsafe — yawanci cikin kwanakin aiki 3-5 bayan zama ya ƙare.
faq.a3: Haka ne! Kana bada shawarar farashinka lokacin nema. Idan aka amince, zaka iya tuntuɓar mu don canzawa.
faq.q4: Idan direba ya ɓata min wuri fa?
faq.a4: Ana riƙe duk bayanan mota da lokacin zama. Taimakonmu zai taimaka wurin warware duk wata matsala.
faq.a5: Direbobi suna ganin yankinka akan taswira, duba idan akwai fili, su biya ta dijital — babu kuɗi a hannu.
faq.q6: Zan iya tsayar da yankina na wani lokaci?
faq.a6: Haka ne — tuntuɓi taimako ko tura imel zuwa support@spacepark.com don tsayar da shi ba tare da rasa asusunka ba.

privacy.title: Manufar Sirri
privacy.date: Ranar Fara Aiki: 9 ga Fabrairu, 2026 · Sabuntawa: 9 ga Fabrairu, 2026

s1.title: 1. Gabatarwa
s1.content: Mun duƙufa wurin kiyaye sirrinka da tsaron bayananka na kai. Wannan manufar tana bayyana yadda muke tattarawa da amfani da bayananka.

s2.title: 2. Bayanan da Muke Tattarawa
s2.item1: Lambar Waya – don shiga da tabbatarwa
s2.item4: Wurin Yanki – adireshi da mizanin wuri
s2.item7: Bayanan Amfani – zama, kuɗi, da ayyuka

s3.title: 3. Yadda Muke Amfani da Bayananka
s3.item2: Bin diddigin zama da lissafa kuɗi

s4.title: 4. Raba Bayanai
s4.content: Ba ma sayar da bayananka. Zamu iya raba bayanai da masu bada sabis (masu biyan kuɗi) ko hukuma idan doka ta buƙaci hakan.

s5.title: 5. Tsaro
s5.item2: Ajiye bayanai a sabobi masu tsaro

s7.title: 7. Sirrin Yara
s7.content: Sabis ɗinmu ba na yara bane ƙasa da shekara 13.

privacy.consent: Ta amfani da Space Park, ka yarda da wannan Manufar Sirri.

terms.title: Shaɗoɗin Sabis

s1.title: 1. Yardawa
s1.content: Ta amfani da Space Park, ka yarda ka bi waɗannan shaɗoɗin.

s2.title: 2. Cancanta da Nauyi
s2.item3: Bi dokokin mallakar fili na gida.
s2.item4: Kai ne kake da alhakin asusunka.

s3.title: 3. Tsaron Asusu
s3.item2: Zamu iya tsayar da asusun da ba mu yarda da shi ba.
s3.item3: Sanar da mu idan an yi amfani da asusunka ba tare da izininka ba.

s4.title: 4. Ayyukan Abokan Tarayya
s4.content: Space Park yana baka dandalin lissafta filinka a dijital.

s5.title: 5. Shaɗoɗin Kuɗi
s5.item2: Kuɗi ana lissafa su bayan ragi na kwamishina.
s5.item3: Ana tura kuɗi zuwa asusun banki da ka bayar.
s5.item4: Duk wata matsalar kuɗi a sanar da mu nan da kwanaki 7.

s6.title: 6. Sirri
s6.content: Duk amfani da bayanai yana ƙarƙashin Manufar Sirri.

s7.title: 7. Karya Shaɗoɗi
s7.content: Duk wani saɓon zai iya kaiwa ga rufe asusu nan take.

s8.title: 8. Haƙƙin Mallaka
s8.content: Duk abubuwan da ke ciki mallakar Space Park Ltd ne.

s9.title: 9. Warware Matsala
s9.content: Zamu yi ƙoƙarin warware matsala cikin lumana.

s10.title: 10. Kare Kai
s10.content: Ana bada sabis ɗin ne "kamar yadda yake".

terms.agreement: TA AMFANI DA SPACE PARK, KA TABBATAR KA KARANTA KUMA KA YARDA DA WAƊANNAN SHAƊOƊIN.
terms.compliance: Ya dace da shaɗoɗin Google Play da Apple App Store.
